nasb.text: When you cultivate the ground, it will no longer yield its strength to you; you will be a vagrant and a wanderer on the earth.”

esv.text: When you work the ground, it shall no longer yield to you its strength. You shall be a fugitive and a wanderer on the earth.”

cnv.text: 你種地，地也不再給你效力；你必在地上流離失所。”

ccb.text: 你种地，地却不会再为你长出任何东西，你必在地上四处漂泊。”

csbs.text: 你耕地，地却不再给你效力；你在大地上必成为漂泊、流荡的人。”
